role: Chariot and Cavalry General (车骑将军)
achievement: Reached Longcheng (茏城), killed/captured several hundred enemies
notes: First campaign; other generals (Gongsun Ao, Li Guang) failed

year: Yuan Shuo Year 1 Autumn (元朔元年秋)

route: From Yunzhong west to Gaogue (高阙)
achievement: Captured Henan region to Longxi, killed/captured several thousand, seized livestock in hundreds of thousands, drove away Baiyang and Loufan kings
result: Established Shuofang Commandery (朔方郡); enfeoffed as Marquis of Changping with 3,800 households

year: Yuan Shuo Year 5 Spring (元朔五年春)
achievement: Surprised Right Wise King at night; captured 10+ minor kings, 15,000+ people, countless livestock
result: Promoted to Grand General (大将军); granted additional 6,000 households

year: Yuan Shuo Year 6 Spring (元朔六年春)
achievement: Killed several thousand; second sortie killed/captured 10,000+
notes: General Su Jian lost his army; Zhao Xin defected to Xiongnu

route: From Dingxiang, north beyond the desert
achievement: Fought Shanyu directly; killed/captured 19,000; reached Zhanyanshan Zhaoxin City
